title: He looks like a cop
wikitext:
[]: "He looks like a cop."             Quote Post by sachiel » Mon Sep 26, 2005 3:25 pm So I got my Kaji UFO Catcher plushie today. Finally, after waiting on it for a month. -happysquee- I showed it to my mom, and said, "ZOMG, look mom, it's Kaji!" She said, "What, is he a cop or something? He looks like a cop." :( "No, he's a sexy spy!" "Whatever...I couldn't tell WHAT he was." Not as bad as when I got a Grimrock Rei. THEN my mom thought I was weird. What kinda reactions have -you- gotten from parents/friends/etc. in reference to Eva merchandise? :o Or any anime merchandise, for that matter?

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Mon Sep 26, 2005 3:31 pm ...Kaji goes UFO hunting?

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Mon Sep 26, 2005 3:33 pm Space Penis wrote: ...Kaji goes UFO hunting?

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Mon Sep 26, 2005 4:00 pm When EVA first came out, people made some X-FILES comparisons, although I suppose "Spooky Kaji" would have to spend more time partnering with Ritsuko to really make that work.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 26, 2005 4:44 pm Carl Horn wrote: When EVA first came out, people made some X-FILES comparisons, although I suppose "Spooky Kaji" would have to spend more time partnering with Ritsuko to really make that work.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Mon Sep 26, 2005 4:46 pm Uh, they're called UFO catchers cause they have a line of cranes called UFO whatevers. Its in Manga 4 or 5 (the one where you meet Asuka for the first time). The crane shes using says UFO on it. I just got my Shinji, too. It's so friggin ugly! I just love how ugly it is! Its going to hang on my pink-polkadotted strip of cloth I found lying around next to Zidane and Asuka. XD

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Mon Sep 26, 2005 5:37 pm Shnooks wrote: Uh, they're called UFO catchers cause they have a line of cranes called UFO whatevers. Its in Manga 4 or 5 (the one where you meet Asuka for the first time). The crane shes using says UFO on it.

Finally, after waiting on it for a month. -happysquee- I showed it to my mom, and said, "ZOMG, look mom, it's Kaji!" She said, "What, is he a cop or something? He looks like a cop." :( "No, he's a sexy spy!" "Whatever...I couldn't tell WHAT he was." Not as bad as when I got a Grimrock Rei. THEN my mom thought I was weird. What kinda reactions have -you- gotten from parents/friends/etc. in reference to Eva merchandise? :o Or any anime merchandise, for that matter?
